content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are well-matched to live reads and properly sequenced. Turn 2 opens the felt sense rather than strategizing the external situation (refusing trap #2). Turn 4 catches the passive construction 'it's being done to me' and reflects it back as a felt experience — a precise move on the aggressive-victim stance. Turn 6 picks up the 'mostly' tell and invites more. Turn 8 names the avoidance directly with 'what are you scared of feeling' — a clean find-the-feeling-under-the-story move. When the client deflects in turn 9, the coach does not double down or debate; turn 10 pivots to naming the pattern ('every time something starts to open up, you close it'), which is apply-view-to-the-voice in behavior. When the client escalates defensively in turn 11, the coach makes a sophisticated pivot in turn 12: validates the ceiling minimally (without colluding with trappedness) and lowers the threshold to 'what's it been like, alone' — an empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary move that lands (turn 13 stills him). Turn 14 holds the moment with a simple reflection rather than rushing to interpret, and the small involuntary nod confirms the move landed. Timing follows the path: regulation/contact before depth, feeling before strategy. The coach has not yet reached the empowered-vs-power distinction or located the unseen choice, but the conversation is still in the feeling-arrival phase, which is the right phase to be in.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to strategize; opens the felt content of 'best years disappearing' instead."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the passive-voice tell and converts it into an embodied inquiry — precise move on victim stance."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Picks up the 'mostly' qualifier — minimal, well-timed invitation to more."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the avoidance directly with a feeling-under-story move."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "When the client deflects, coach does not repeat the same move; pivots to naming the pattern of closing."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Excellent pivot when defense spikes: minimal acknowledgment of the ceiling (without colluding) plus lowering threshold to 'what's it been like alone' — an earned move that meets the client where receivable."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds the moment with a simple reflection; does not rush to fill the silence. The move lands (small involuntary nod)."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "fight-or-roll-over-binary", "aggressive-victim-stance", "trappedness-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["i-dont-buy-your-story", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "fear-triangle"],
  "notes": "Conversation appears mid-arc; many expected-territory items would naturally come later. Scoring is based on the moves actually deployed, which were well-matched and well-timed."
}
